{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/262839898?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/bugbunny-research", "id": 262839898, "login": "bugbunny-research", "node_id": "U_kgDOD6qeWg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-53928", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:L/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-613", "name": "Insufficient Session Expiration"}], "description": "### Summary
A stolen refresh token survived a password-forgot flow and could be used to mint fresh
JWTs even after the user reset their password.

### Details
`passwordChange` and `passwordReset` deleted the user's refresh tokens, but
`passwordForgot` only rotated `token_version` and revoked OAuth tokens — it did not
call `UserRefreshToken.deleteAllUserToken(user.id)`. An attacker holding a captured
refresh cookie could still exchange it for a new access token after the victim
triggered the recovery flow.

### Impact
Persistent unauthorized access after password recovery. Once a refresh token leaks, the
documented "Forgot password" recovery flow did not in fact revoke the attacker's
session.

### Credit
This issue was reported by [@bugbunny-research](https://github.com/bugbunny-research).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00242, "percentile": 0.15154}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-r989-7g3j-wjhw", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-17T14:07:33Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-r989-7g3j-wjhw", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-r989-7g3j-wjhw"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-53928"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-17T14:07:33Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/security/advisories/GHSA-r989-7g3j-wjhw", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-r989-7g3j-wjhw"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nocodb/nocodb/security-advisories/GHSA-r989-7g3j-wjhw", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb", "summary": "NocoDB: Refresh Tokens Persist Through Password Recovery", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-17T14:07:34Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-r989-7g3j-wjhw", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "nocodb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.301.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: NocoDB: Refresh Tokens Persist Through Password Recovery
